/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:COURT REAFFIRMS ORIGINAL ORDER THAT THERE ISNO HOME DETENTION IN THIS MATTER/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMSOF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:2 IN PERSON CHECK INS AND ONE PHONE CHECK IN PER WEEK/WEAP/CTORD:DO NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL OR DRUGS INCLUDING MARIJUANA/X:FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CON:SILAS GENESON/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:07-29-21 (30), 08-16-21 (60)/987,2/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 06-21-21/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 06-28-21/DOP/TE:30 MINUTES/
